title: phaseolus vulgaris var. zebrinus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. zebrinus, also known as the zebra bush bean, is a variety of the common bean plant (Phaseolus vulgaris) characterized by its striped or zebra-like appearance. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Phaseolus vulgaris var. zebrinus has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of consuming the beans or using them in herbal preparations include lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Phaseolus vulgaris var. zebrinus can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
